economic_ownership_map.evidence: 10-Q Q1 2026 liquidation-basis statement of net assets; proof base 24.5486/sh via net_asset_value@1.0 (GYRO/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260513_rpt20260331_acc0001437749_26_016537.htm).
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: ASC 205-30 estimated net realizable value, not historical cost.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Entitlement and sale timing sit in the range. Embedded option documented in component_valuation with treatment=embedded.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Forced sale or failed entitlement marks real estate NRV below the low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: B2K Flowerfield entitlement option (embedded in NRV)
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Real estate held for sale at estimated NRV
economic_ownership_map.evidence: B2K agreement $24.0–$28.74M on ~49 acres; base NRV already uses $28.74M. Embedded so not added twice; high case is premium to current NRV if entitlements exceed the plan.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Embedded in real_estate_nrv base; additive high only for upside above current NRV.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Target liquidation completion 2028-12-31; Article 78 can extend into 2029 in bear.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assumes Smithtown site plan path supporting the \.74M gross already in NRV.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Seller credit \ and entitlement costs are inside the liquidation cost accrual.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Entitlement and sale timing sit in the range. Embedded option documented in component_valuation with treatment=embedded.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Article 78 or Smithtown denial collapses the B2K path and forces a re-mark below current NRV.

facts.label: B2K Flowerfield entitlement option (embedded in NRV)
facts.evidence: B2K agreement $24.0–$28.74M on ~49 acres; base NRV already uses $28.74M. Embedded so not added twice; high case is premium to current NRV if entitlements exceed the plan.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Real estate held for sale at estimated NRV
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: ASC 205-30 estimated net realizable value, not historical cost.

top_value_drivers.label: Estimated liquidation and operating costs (net)
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Management's disclosed accrual through the 2028 target date.

top_value_drivers.label: Cash and other assets
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Working capital available inside the liquidation plan.

top_value_drivers.label: Other liabilities
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Remaining balance-sheet liabilities senior to equity.

top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Contractual debt senior to equity distributions.

falsifiers: Forced sale or failed entitlement marks real estate NRV below the low case.
Cash burn through 2028 consumes more than the low-case residual.
Refinancing or default increases the claim above the low case.
Further re-estimation (as in FY2025 NAV drop $13.91→$11.76) pushes costs beyond the low case.
Unmodeled claims exceed the low case.
Article 78 or Smithtown denial collapses the B2K path and forces a re-mark below current NRV.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
